headline: Five systems, one command center
intro: The platform now reads like an operating surface: one shell for interpreting intent, editing assets, managing workflows, and deploying changes.

items.title: Command Router API
items.description: Validates intent, normalizes commands, and dispatches work to generators, editors, scripts, and deployment agents.

items.title: Content Engine
items.description: Creates and edits JSON-driven pages, pricing surfaces, product detail views, and blog content under /content.

items.title: Media Engine
items.description: Supports asset sourcing and visual generation workflows so campaigns and product pages can be updated without leaving the workspace.

items.title: Deploy Agent
items.description: Stages workspace changes, commits them with AI-aware messages, pushes upstream, syncs deployment state, and records status.
